rows.label: tev079301_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Horonalderon about Goetia.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_SEL0021
rows.name:
Ask Horonalderon about
recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask Horonalderon about ores found
in the northern continents.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_SEL1021
rows.name:
Ask Horonalderon about
recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_SEL2021
rows.name:
Ask Horonalderon about
recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0001
rows.name:
Even when we were in the Growth, we
heard rumors of her cruelty. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0002
rows.name:
*fsssh* They say she tortures prisoners of war to
death, and also slaughters native peoples without
orders just to see the torment on their faces.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0003
rows.name:
I've seen even the cruelest of Growth soldiers
look repulsed upon learning that they've
being transferred into her unit. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0004
rows.name:
That said, I've also seen some request to join
her forces just so they could unleash their
unbridled bloodlust as savage Bias do. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0009
rows.name:
You could say that we are engaged
in a search-and- recovery mission
just like you BLADEs. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0010
rows.name:
The difference is that while you're seeking pieces of
your Lifepoint, we're searching for the toxic materials
called voltant that are concealed within NLA. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0011
rows.name:
We know that voltant can be found
throughout Mira as well, and we must
find and purify it all. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0012
rows.name:
That is our nature as Zaruboggan,
and our calling. Either way, it is
a duty we cannot ignore. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0013
rows.name:
Though there exist exceptions, like
my subordinate Hoskeran, who are not
faithful to that duty. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0018
rows.name:
It appears that you humans have managed to
expand your sphere of influence to encompass
White Woods and Cauldros as well. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0019
rows.name:
I've heard that rare metals like infernium,
parhelion platinum, and cimmerian cinnabar
can be mined there. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0020
rows.name:
I only hope that your exploration teams
can stay ahead of the Growth's. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0021
rows.name:
If they do—and if you have the extra room—it
would be most appreciated if you could bring some
of the voltant-rich ores back to NLA. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG0022
rows.name:
I, along with my brethren, would
be happy to take responsibility
for devoltanizing them. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG1001
rows.name:
Thanks to you and Piers, everything
concluded safely. My deepest
gratitude to you! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG1002
rows.name:
But as for Hoskeran, I never imagined that
his incompetence ran so deep. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG1003
rows.name:
If only your Blue Bloods were able
to resist voltant, I'd ask you humans
to take over his job. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG1004
rows.name:
Er, would that be too dangerous?
*fsssh* If you're interested,
please let me know![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG2001
rows.name:
Thanks to you and Piers, everything
concluded safely. My deepest
gratitude to you! *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG2002
rows.name:
And as for Hoskeran... Well, I never
imagined he'd rise to the occasion
in a time of crisis. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG2003
rows.name:
Frankly, I'd always thought he was
a complete fool, but it seems I
may have been mistaken. *fsssh*[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG2004
rows.name:
Perhaps it's time I gave him
a more important job...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev079301_MSG2005
rows.name:
Does that scare you? Don't worry! *fsssh* Knowing
him, I'm sure he'll excavate some voltant that
no one else would have been able to find.[ST:wait ]
